zh.title: 希尔德加德预言全集 - 宾根的希尔德加德神视与末世预言 | Hildegard of Bingen Prophecies
zh.description: 中世纪德国本笃会女修院院长希尔德加德（1098-1179）的预言完整收录，出自《认识主道》(Scivias)、《神圣工程之书》等著作。涵盖教会腐败、末世审判、敌基督、宇宙秩序等主题。2012年被教宗本笃十六世封为教会圣师。
zh.keywords: 希尔德加德,宾根的希尔德加德,Hildegard of Bingen,Scivias,中世纪预言,教会预言,末世预言,敌基督,教会圣师,神视
zh.ogTitle: 希尔德加德预言全集 | Hildegard of Bingen Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 中世纪德国神秘主义者希尔德加德的预言完整收录与解读。涵盖教会腐败、末世审判、宇宙秩序等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 宾根的希尔德加德预言全集：中世纪最著名的女性神秘主义者，教会圣师，其神视涵盖教会改革、末世与宇宙秩序。

en.title: Hildegard of Bingen Prophecies - Visions from Scivias & Liber Divinorum Operum | Full Archive
en.description: Complete collection of prophecies by Hildegard of Bingen (1098-1179), German Benedictine abbess and Doctor of the Church. Visions from Scivias and other works covering Church corruption, end-times, the Antichrist, and cosmic order.
en.keywords: Hildegard of Bingen,Scivias,medieval prophecy,Church prophecy,end times,Antichrist,Doctor of the Church,mystic visions,Liber Divinorum Operum
en.ogTitle: Hildegard of Bingen Prophecies - Complete Visionary Archive
en.ogDescription: Complete prophecies of Hildegard of Bingen (1098-1179), Benedictine abbess and Doctor of the Church. Visions on Church corruption, end-times, and cosmic order.
en.twitterDescription: Prophecies of Hildegard of Bingen — medieval mystic, composer, Doctor of the Church. Visions on Church reform, the Antichrist, and the end of days.
